LANG_UI_DICT.hub_events_intro: All alerts and analysis events live here. For daily duty use Alarm Snapshots; for follow-up use Review Queue.
LANG_UI_DICT.hub_setup_intro: Connect cameras and configure analysis. Recommended order: cameras → control rules → algorithms.
LANG_UI_DICT.hub_card_alarm_desc: Alerts with screenshots — motion, loitering, etc.
LANG_UI_DICT.hub_card_zone_desc: Draw areas on video for analysis
LANG_UI_DICT.hub_card_control_desc: Draw areas on video for analysis
LANG_UI_DICT.sm_reid_hint: ReID feature models only support OnnxRuntime, default input 128×256; test requires YOLO detect model for person crop.
LANG_UI_DICT.sm_reid_detector_hint: ReID uses detect model to locate person, then extracts features and track_id
LANG_UI_DICT.sm_reid_no_detector: No detect model available; add a YOLO Detect model first
LANG_UI_DICT.alg_reid_onnx_only: ReID models only support the OnnxRuntime engine
LANG_UI_DICT.alg_reid_osnet_only: ReID task model type must be OSNet
LANG_UI_DICT.alg_reid_need_detector: ReID test requires an auxiliary detect model
LANG_UI_DICT.alg_reid_detector_must_detect: Auxiliary model must be a Detect task type
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_reid_flow_hint: ReID cannot detect full frame alone: YOLO locates targets, OSNet extracts features and track_id, then post-process (e.g. line count).
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_post_area_hint: Alarm when target center enters the control area
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_post_area_desc: Alarm when target center enters the control polygon. For perimeter, no-entry, and hazard zones.
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_post_line_cross_desc: Alarm immediately on forward (A→B) line cross; deduplicates same person. Unlike line count: no accumulation.
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_post_line_cross_hint: Alarm on forward cross A→B; control needs area + direction line
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_post_line_count_desc: Count forward/reverse line crosses in area; alarm when either direction hits threshold. For entrance flow and capacity limits.
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_post_line_count_hint: Alarm when cumulative crosses reach threshold; draw rectangle + direction line A→B
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_post_direction_desc: Alarm when movement direction in the area matches the configured direction. For one-way and wrong-way detection.
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_post_direction_hint: Alarm when movement direction matches configured direction
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_post_density_desc: Alarm when target count in the area reaches threshold (fires once when rising to threshold). For crowds, queues, congestion.
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_post_density_hint: Alarm when target count reaches threshold; configure density threshold in control
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_post_dwell_desc: Alarm when target stays in area longer than dwell threshold (seconds). Unlike area intrusion: dwell waits for timeout.
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_post_dwell_hint: Alarm when stay in area exceeds dwell threshold (seconds)
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_post_line_diff: Line cross = instant alarm; line count = alarm after N people, with forward/reverse totals.
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_post_help_sub: 6 post-process types; see each description for details
LANG_UI_DICT.biz_line_count_threshold_hint: Alarm when line-cross count reaches threshold; 0 disables that direction. Draw rectangle + direction line A→B.
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_required_on_hint: On: target must be in control area; line-cross still needs direction line
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_required_off_hint: Off: no area check; line-cross needs direction line only
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_region_post_need_required: Area post-process requires「Required zone」and a drawn region
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_draw_tip_line_only: Draw direction line A→B (region optional when Required zone is off)
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_draw_tip_region: ▭ rectangle: two corners · ⬠ polygon: ≥3 points, click first point or ✓ · right-click undo
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_draw_tip_three: Three shapes: ▭ rectangle · ⬠ polygon · → direction line A→B (arrow = forward) · right-click undo
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_line_step2: Step 2/2: select → draw direction line A→B
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_health_stalled_toast: Video stream stalled; analysis stopped. Restart analysis manually.
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_inference_degraded_toast: Detection inference timed out; alarms may fail. Restart analysis or check small model.
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_per_zone_toggle_hint: Each control starts/stops independently; one camera can run partial controls
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_auto_required_off_line: Line-cross algorithms need direction line only;「Required zone」auto-disabled
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_line_only_need_region_or_off: Line-cross: draw ▭/⬠ region, or disable「Required zone」and keep direction line only
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_draw_hint_rect_line: Draw rectangle and direction line A→B for forward direction
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_rect_hint: Draw rectangle with two diagonal corners
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_line_need_b: Click direction line end point B
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_line_need_ab: Draw direction line: start A → end B
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_line_required: Line-cross algorithms require direction line A→B
LANG_UI_DICT.zone_live_offline: Video offline; confirm camera is online
